title: Agent Harness explained in 8min..
summary: Agent harness engineering is presented as an evolved approach to building agentic systems that goes beyond prompt engineering and context engineering. The video outlines how harness engineering addresses the limits of prior approaches and incorporates loops and architectural patterns.
